name: RABBIT-BUG-2
title: orphan .claude/docs/bugs/ created by test leg running pre-impl file-bug.sh
description: During the rabbit-bug Phase 2 TEST leg, the test script for t6 invoked file-bug.sh (the pre-impl version) with --related-feature nonexistent-feature-xyz. The old script had no registry validation and defaulted BUG_ROOT to .claude/docs/bugs, creating NONEXISTENT-FEATURE-XYZ-1 and NONEXISTENT-FEATURE-XYZ-2 artifacts there. The new file-bug.sh (impl leg) exits non-zero for unknown features and never writes. Fix: rm -rf .claude/docs/ (entire accidental dir).

history.note: [skip-vet: data-only artifact deletion, no code change; verified dir no longer exists] Deleted .claude/docs/ via python3 shutil.rmtree. Root cause was test leg running pre-impl file-bug.sh which had .claude/docs/bugs as default BUG_ROOT.
